creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
You claim the 24th but also the 3rd of november as installation point, =
which is it?

In addition; since head changes constantly, can you try a more recent =
snapshot, this one is a week old and lots of commits had been made, we =
need to narrow it down more.

1) Is it still in current?
2) if you downgrade to 2010-11-23 (assuming that the 24th was the right =
date), does it still occur? keep dropping the date till we can pinpoint =
the exact date.

Thanks
Remko
